title: Dialogue Ontology Relation Extraction via Constrained Chain-of-Thought Decoding
key_concepts: Dialogue ontology with three levels: domains, slots, and values
problem_addressed: State-of-the-art TOD systems rely on fixed ontologies
Difficulty in transferring TOD systems to new domains
Manual ontology labeling is error-prone and expensive
Need to leverage existing labeled datasets for new domains
proposed_solution: Using constrained CoT-decoding for dialogue ontology extraction
Relation extraction approach for hierarchy establishment
Using instruction-tuned LLMs with one-shot and few-shot learning
methodology: Dialogue term extraction followed by hierarchy establishment
Constrained decoding where prediction is limited to input terms

key_figure.description: Example of constrained CoT-decoding for dialogue ontology extraction from MultiWOZ 2.1
